/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -g CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/CacheClass.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/alu.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/bq.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/btb.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/checker.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/checkpoint.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/debug.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/decode.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/dispatch.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/execute.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/fetch.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/fetch_queue.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/fetchunit.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/gshare.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/histogram.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/ic.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/issue_queue.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/lane.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/lsu.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/parameters.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/payload.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/pipeline.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/pipeline_register.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/ras.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/register_read.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/rename.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/renamer.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/retire.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/schedule.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/sim.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/squash.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/stats.cc.o "CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/tage-sc-l-wrapper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/tage-sc-l.cc.o" CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/tc.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/vp.cc.o CMakeFiles/721sim.dir/writeback.cc.o -o 721sim  ../riscv-base/libriscv.a ../riscv-base/fesvr/libfesvr-static.a ../riscv-base/softfloat/libsoftfloat.a alu_ops/libuarchsim-alu-ops.a /mnt/ncsudrive/d/dananth/flyworks/2nd_sem/721_Advance_MicroArc/project_4/721sim/uarchsim/mdp/lib/libuarchsim-mdp.a -ldl /usr/lib64/libz.so -pthread ../riscv-base/softfloat/libsoftfloat.a
